---
title: "Anna Meredith Barrett Lennard"
---

## Anna Meredith Barrett Lennard

**Dates:** (1847/8-1940)

**Maiden name:** (Harris)

### Description

teacher and writer

### Biography

Daughter of Chaplin Aaron Harris of Evergreen, Baltimore USA she married (4 Dec 1873), as his second wife, Charles Edward Barrett Lennard (1835-July 1874). Evidently a novelist who lived in Germany, and a moaner. Fiction exists published by Mrs Charles Edward Barrett Lennard. The identification of CMY’s correspondent with this person seems likely but cannot be certain.[PB 1914; 1881, 1901 London census]

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 14 1900
- [To Anna Meredith Barrett Lennard, Decr 21st 1898](../letters/3389_To_Anna_Meredith_Barrett_Lennard.html)
- [To Anna Meredith Barrett Lennard, Oct 7th 1898](../letters/3383_To_Anna_Meredith_Barrett_Lennard.html)
- Letter from Jany 28th 1898
- Letter from Nov 1st  [1888]
- Letter from Novr 30th [1886?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
